rag_rules: Align declared types with actual expression types to resolve 'assumed type' vs 'actual type' errors
Place component type contracts in annex agree blocks within component type scopes
generic_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Ensure all identifiers in contracts are visible in the current scope
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **} blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful variables: `initial_value -> pre(variable) + step`
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE equations
anti_patterns: Do not assume that AGREE will infer types; explicitly declare types for constants and equations
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope; use component type scope for output range guarantees
irrelevant_topics: Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
